value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value:
import org.apache.nifi.processor.io.OutputStreamCallback
def startYear = 2020 def startMonth = 1
def endYear = 2025 def endMonth = 12
for (int y = startYear; y <= endYear; y++) { for (int m = 1; m <= 12; m++) { if (y == startYear && m < startMonth) continue if (y == endYear && m > endMonth) continue
def filename = "On_Time_Reporting_Carrier_On_Time_Performance_1987_present_${y}_${m}.zip" def url = "https://transtats.bts.gov/PREZIP/${filename}"
def ff = session.create()
ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "year", y.toString()) ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "month", m.toString()) ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "source", "bts") ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "dataset", "on_time_performance") ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "download.url", url) ff = session.putAttribute(ff, "filename", filename)
ff = session.write(ff, { out -> out.write(url.getBytes("UTF-8")) } as OutputStreamCallback)
session.transfer(ff, REL_SUCCESS) } }

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern
